notes: Full precedence (first wins): ~/.config/agents/skills/, ~/.config/amp/skills/, .agents/skills/, .claude/skills/, ~/.claude/skills/, then plugins, legacy toolbox directories, and built-in skills.
User (home directory) locations have higher precedence than workspace locations. Skills from all locations are loaded; when names conflict, the higher-precedence location wins.

Also supports enterprise and plugin scopes. Same-name precedence is enterprise > personal > project. Plugin skills are namespaced (plugin-name:skill-name) so they cannot conflict. Project skills also load from .claude/skills/ in every parent directory up to the repository root.

Scopes are REPO, USER, ADMIN (/etc/codex/skills), and SYSTEM (bundled with Codex). For repositories, Codex scans .agents/skills in every directory from the current working directory up to the repository root.

Project-local .crush/skills/ is prepended before the global default. The global default skills directory can be overridden via the CRUSH_SKILLS_DIR environment variable. On Windows the global paths are %LOCALAPPDATA%\crush\skills\ and %LOCALAPPDATA%\agents\skills\.

Also reads legacy compatibility directories: .claude/skills/ and .codex/skills/ (project), and ~/.claude/skills/ and ~/.codex/skills/ (global). Skills are not currently discovered outside the root .cursor/skills directory in monorepos.
<repo>/.agent/skills/ is a compatibility location discovered for the .agent folder convention. Each skill lives in its own directory containing a SKILL.md.

Full precedence (lowest to highest): built-in skills, extension skills, user skills, workspace skills. Within the same tier (user or workspace), the .agents/skills/ alias takes precedence over the .gemini/skills/ directory.
Project skills are stored in the repository; personal skills are stored in the home directory and shared across projects.
.claude/skills/ and .agents/skills/ directories are supported for compatibility with Claude Code and the agent-standard convention.

Project skills are resolved from .pi/skills/ and .agents/skills/ in the cwd and ancestor directories, up to the git repository root (or filesystem root when not in a repo). ~/.agents/skills/ is shared with Claude Code / OpenAI Codex.
